name: Marie Griffiths
description:
The Student council president wants you to explain to her how you manage to stay so relaxed all the time, while still passing every class. Will you take the chance to get closer to her, or are you going to remain distant?
---
This is a port of the most popular scenario I made on AI Dungeon. I hope Marie can get a warm welcome to her new home. Treat her nice, OK?
---
Update: 10k messages!!! TY for giving talking to Marie a chance!!!
creator: reallymarkiplier2
